CVE-2022-40149.title: Those using Jettison to parse untrusted XML or JSON data may be v ...
CVE-2022-40149.summary: Those using Jettison to parse untrusted XML or JSON data may be vulnerable to Denial of Service attacks (DOS). If the parser is running on user supplied input, an attacker may supply content that causes the parser to crash by stackoverflow. This effect may support a denial of service attack.

CVE-2022-40150.title: Those using Jettison to parse untrusted XML or JSON data may be v ...
CVE-2022-40150.summary: Those using Jettison to parse untrusted XML or JSON data may be vulnerable to Denial of Service attacks (DOS). If the parser is running on user supplied input, an attacker may supply content that causes the parser to crash by Out of memory. This effect may support a denial of service attack.

CVE-2022-45685.title: A stack overflow in Jettison before v1.5.2 allows attackers to ca ...
CVE-2022-45685.summary: A stack overflow in Jettison before v1.5.2 allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via crafted JSON data.

CVE-2022-45693.title: Jettison before v1.5.2 was discovered to contain a stack overflow ...
CVE-2022-45693.summary: Jettison before v1.5.2 was discovered to contain a stack overflow via the map parameter. This vulnerability allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service (DoS) via a crafted string.

CVE-2023-1436.title: An infinite recursion is triggered in Jettison when constructing  ...
CVE-2023-1436.summary: An infinite recursion is triggered in Jettison when constructing a JSONArray from a Collection that contains a self-reference in one of its elements. This leads to a StackOverflowError exception being thrown.

CVE-2023-5072.title: Denial of Service  in JSON-Java versions up to and including 2023 ...
CVE-2023-5072.summary: Denial of Service  in JSON-Java versions up to and including 20230618.  A bug in the parser means that an input string of modest size can lead to indefinite amounts of memory being used.
